nodes.recentposition: Marketing Intern at Paradox in Los Angeles, CA
nodes.bios: Hi everyone! I'm Aishu and I initiated in the fall quarter of my first year at UCI. In my free time, I love going to coffee shops, making keychains, and listening to music! A fun fact about me is that I almost always introduce myself as eye-shoe to help people learn my name. During recruitment, ask me about my pasta obsession!
